commands.review_summary:
The PR updates memory-core's builtin SQLite manager to reopen a cached live DB handle after an external atomic index rebuild, resets metadata-cache state during safe reindex, defers search-triggered sync until after readiness checks, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +90, Tests +70. Total +160 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The added tests model a live manager holding a stale handle while a CLI manager atomically rebuilds the same SQLite index, though I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
